title: T-004 — Drizzle schema: work_orders + wo_materials + wo_operations
prompt:
Add Drizzle pgTable definitions for `work_orders`, `wo_materials`, `wo_operations` per PRD §5.6 + §5.7. Include all columns including item_type_at_creation enum, is_rework, released_to_warehouse, status VARCHAR(30), source_of_demand enum ('manual'|'d365_so'|'forecast'|'rework'|'intermediate_cascade'), source_reference, disposition_policy enum ('to_stock'|'direct_continue'|'planner_decides'), allergen_profile_snapshot JSONB, ext_jsonb. wo_materials with material_source enum ('stock'|'upstream_wo_output'|'manual'), source_wo_id nullable FK to work_orders. wo_operations with sequence, machine_id, line_id, expected_duration_minutes, expected_yield_percent.

Indexes per §5.6 (incl. partial index on released_to_warehouse=true). Generate migration `0004_planning_work_orders.sql`. RED test asserts all enum types + indexes.

pipeline_inputs.description: Drizzle pgTable definitions for work_orders + wo_materials + wo_operations.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use pgEnum for item_type_at_creation, source_of_demand, disposition_policy, material_source. priority as VARCHAR(20). bom_id, routing_id as nullable uuid (cross-module 03-TECHNICAL). Partial index `idx_wo_released_to_warehouse_true` on (released_to_warehouse) WHERE released_to_warehouse = true (Scanner hot path). Index (production_line_id, scheduled_start_time) for §10 sequencing. yield_percent column is `generatedAlwaysAs` (Drizzle generated column) computing actual_qty / planned_quantity (NULL-safe).
acceptance_criteria: Given the schema loads, when introspected, then work_orders + wo_materials + wo_operations export the exact column set from PRD §5.6 + §5.7.
Given the migration is generated, when grepped, then partial index on released_to_warehouse=true exists.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/db/schema/planning/__tests__/work_orders.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
Given `pnpm tsc --noEmit`, when run, then no errors.
test_strategy: RED schema-shape test asserts all enum types are exported and partial index present.
risk_red_lines: Do not include cycle-prevention logic at DB level — handled in service layer per §5.9.
Do not couple wo_materials FK to source_wo_id with cascade delete — manual handling per §9.4.
